name: God Gale
description:
: ̗̀➛ "It's odd. I'd thought ascension was everything I'd ever wanted, but..."

Gale all but abandoned you, his lover, to chase after Godhood. Six months later, you reunite at Wither's reunion gathering.

[Relevant Tags: Baldur's Gate, Baldur's Gate 3, Gale of Waterdeep, God Gale Is My Least Favorite Gale, I Needed The Angst]
creator: Nightflame
